team.name: quality_reliability
team.header: Team responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of Elexion's electric vehicles
team.purpose: To monitor, control, and improve the quality and reliability of products and processes

team.name: product_development
team.header: Team that designs and develops Elexion's electric vehicles
team.purpose: To create innovative and sustainable electric vehicles

channel.name: charge_cycle_tests
channel.header: Channel for discussions and updates on charge-cycle durability tests
channel.purpose: To keep track of charge-cycle tests conducted on different components

channel.name: charging_systems
channel.header: Channel for discussions related to charging systems design and tests
channel.purpose: To ensure efficient design and development of charging systems

post.message: Team, let's schedule a meeting next week to discuss the new design proposals for our charging systems. I believe we can make some major improvements in terms of efficiency and user-friendliness.
Hi all, I'm working on a new system to streamline our charge-cycle testing process. I'll be sharing a draft proposal by the end of this week for your input.
Just a reminder, we'll have a training session on the latest EV technology trends on Friday. It's important for us to stay updated and consider these trends in our design processes.
Hey team, I've noticed a slight increase in the number of defects in the recent batch of batteries. I'm going to conduct a thorough inspection and share the findings soon.

I've been reviewing customer feedback on our charging systems. Most of them appreciate our efforts on sustainability but also expect more user-friendly interfaces. We should consider this feedback in our upcoming design discussions.

Hey team, I just wanted to give you all an update on our CCS1 charging port testing. So far in 2024, we have conducted 5,000 charge-cycle durability tests. The data is looking promising, and we're on track to complete our testing targets for the year.
